metadata.title: JD — Personal Training Berlin
metadata.description: Personal training, coaching and custom training plans in Berlin and online. Strength building, functional training, athletics — with structure, progression and real coaching.

hero.subtitle: Coaching that truly fits you.
hero.description: Personal training, coaching & custom training plans — in Berlin or online. I help you get stronger, fitter and more structured — with training and coaching that truly fits you.

about.heading: ABOUT ME
about.description: I'm Jess, a personal trainer from Berlin with a background in performance sport, athletics and basketball. My focus is on strength building, fitness, functional training, stability and real consistency. I don't work with aimless training or short-term motivation — I work with structure, progression and coaching that truly fits you and your daily life.

forWhom.heading: MY COACHING IS IDEAL FOR YOU IF YOU…
items: need a plan that truly fits you
want to approach your training seriously and with a system
are looking for support and accountability
want to not just start, but actually stick with it

whatMakesDifferent.heading: WHAT MAKES MY COACHING DIFFERENT
items: individually tailored to you and your goal
training in clear phases instead of random workouts
technique, structure and progression instead of chaos
background in athletics, strength training, functional training and basketball

step1.title: Call or inquiry
step1.description: We briefly talk about your goal, your current level and what makes the most sense for you.

step2.title: Plan or start
step2.description: You get the right structure for your training — whether in 1:1 coaching, with a training plan or with ongoing support.

step3.title: Progress and adjustment
step3.description: We adjust your training, build progress and make sure you actually stick with it.

personalTraining.title: 1:1 Personal Training
personalTraining.subtitle: Individual. Direct. Effective.
personalTraining.description: You don't just want a plan — you want direct coaching, clear corrections and someone who guides you and keeps you on track? Then 1:1 personal training is the best option for you.
personalTraining.description2: Every session is individually tailored to your goal, your level and where you currently stand. It's not just about training — it's about technique, structure, progression and real progress.
features: clear progression instead of random training
adapted to your goal, level and daily life

trainingPlan.title: Custom Training Plan
trainingPlan.subtitle: Your plan. Clearly structured. Tailored to you.
trainingPlan.description: You want to train independently, but finally with a plan that truly fits you? Then this is your perfect entry point.
trainingPlan.description2: I create an individual training plan based on a questionnaire and an initial consultation, so I can properly assess your goals, current level, daily routine, equipment and any limitations.
steps: You book and pay for your package
We have an initial consultation / check-up call
Then I create your training plan
features: tailored to your goal, level and equipment
clear exercises, sets, reps and rest periods

coaching.title: Training Plan + Support
coaching.subtitle: Structure, support and accountability — fully online
coaching.description: You don't just want a training plan, but also feedback, adjustments and someone who keeps you on track? Then this is the right offer for you.
coaching.description2: The support is fully online. You train independently, but can message me anytime with questions about your workouts, exercises, weights or progress. I typically respond within 10 hours.
coaching.description3: I'm not just your coach — I'm also your accountability partner: someone who thinks along, motivates and makes sure you actually stick with it.

vip.title: VIP Coaching
vip.subtitle: Exclusive. Close. Personal.
vip.description: You don't just want training — you want a personal coach who works exclusively with you, addresses your needs and closely supports you? Then VIP Coaching is the most intensive form of collaboration.
vip.description2: This isn't just about workouts — it's about training, nutrition guidance, support, accountability and a much closer level of guidance, individually tailored to you and your daily life.

items.question: How does the initial consultation work?
items.answer: In the initial consultation, we look at your goal, your current level and your circumstances together. This helps me better assess which offer makes the most sense for you and what the best start looks like.

items.question: What's the difference between the training plan and the training plan + support?
items.answer: With the individual training plan, you get a clear, tailored plan that you follow independently. With the training plan + support, you also get ongoing support, adjustments, feedback and accountability. In other words: you're not alone with your training and can ask questions anytime.

items.question: Is the support for online offers completely digital?
items.answer: Yes. The support runs fully online via messages and, when needed, check-up calls. You train independently but get support, adjustments and feedback so you're not alone with your plan.

items.question: How quickly will I get a response?
items.answer: I typically respond within 10 hours. You can message me anytime when questions about your training, exercises or progress come up.

items.question: What if I don't know how to do an exercise?
items.answer: No problem. If you've booked the training plan + support, just message me. Depending on the situation, I'll send you example videos, explanations or suitable alternatives. The important thing is: you should be able to perform the exercises safely and correctly.

items.question: Can I switch from the training plan to personal training later?
items.answer: Yes, of course. If you feel you want more direct guidance, corrections or personal support, we can switch from the training plan to 1:1 personal training or VIP coaching at any time.

items.question: Who is VIP Coaching for?
items.answer: VIP Coaching is ideal if you don't just want a plan, but are looking for closer, more personal and more exclusive guidance — with more support, more structure and more direct communication.

items.question: How does the individual training plan work?
items.answer: You first book your package, then fill out a questionnaire and we have a short initial consultation. After that, I create your training plan — tailored to your goal, your level and your possibilities.

items.question: How quickly will I get my training plan?
items.answer: You'll usually receive your training plan within 3–5 days, often even faster.

items.question: Do I need to be fit already to work with you?
items.answer: No, of course not. Whether beginner or advanced, I meet you where you are. My coaching is designed to adapt to your level, your goal and your possibilities.

items.question: Can I start with a training plan even if I don't train at a gym yet?
items.answer: Yes. A training plan can also be designed so you can follow it at home or with minimal equipment.

cta.subtitle: Whether personal training, custom training plan or online coaching — we'll find the path that fits you.

section1.description1: I'm Jess, a personal trainer from Berlin with a background in performance sport, athletics and basketball. My focus is on strength building, fitness, functional training, stability and real consistency.
section1.description2: I don't work with aimless training or short-term motivation — I work with structure, progression and coaching that truly fits you and your daily life.

section2.description1: I work with people who've started and stopped many times before. Who aren't lazy — but overwhelmed by plans that don't fit their life, and left alone with good intentions that disappear after two weeks.
section2.description2: My job isn't to yell you through a workout. My job is to build a training structure with you that holds up even when Tuesday gets stressful, your back hurts, or you haven't trained for three days.

section3.description1: Whether you want to get stronger, lose fat, improve your fitness or simply train consistently again — we'll build a path together that you can actually follow through on.
section3.description2: No standard plan. No "just push through." Instead, a system that fits your daily life, your body and your level — with someone who thinks along and stays on it.

contact.title: Contact / Book a call
contact.description: If you have questions or want to get started right away, just book a call or message me directly.

use.title: Use of the Service

liability.title: Limitation of Liability

law.content: These Terms of Service are governed by the laws of the Federal Republic of Germany.

termination.title: Termination
termination.content: We reserve the right to terminate or suspend your account and access to the Service at our sole discretion, without notice, for conduct that we believe violates these Terms of Service or is harmful to other users of the Service, us, or third parties, or for any other reason.

contactInfo.title: Contact Information
contactInfo.content: For any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us:

policy.title: Privacy Policy
policy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how Jess Personal Training collects, uses, and discloses your Personal Information when you visit or use our jesstrainer.de.

collect.title: Information We Collect
collect.intro: We collect various types of information for various purposes to provide and improve our service to you.
collect.personalData: Personal Data: We may ask you to provide us with certain personally identifiable information that can be used to contact or identify you.
collect.usageData: Usage Data: We may also collect information on how the service is accessed and used.

use.title: How We Use Your Information
use.intro: We use the collected data for various purposes:
items: To provide and maintain our service.
To notify you about changes to our service.
To allow you to participate in interactive features of our service when you choose to do so.

disclosure.title: Disclosure of Data
disclosure.intro: We may disclose your Personal Information under the following circumstances:
disclosure.legal: Legal Requirements: To comply with a legal obligation.
disclosure.transaction: Transaction: In case of a sale, merger, or acquisition.

security.title: Security
security.content: The security of your data is important to us, but remember that no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.

changes.title: Changes to This Privacy Policy
changes.content: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page.

contactUs.title: Contact Us
contactUs.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:
